# OnGroupedDataSet

###

Related Doc: [package acceptPartialFunctions](<package.html>)

[ ](<../../../../../../../../index.html#org.apache.flink.api.scala.extensions.impl.acceptPartialFunctions.OnGroupedDataSet> "Permalink")

####  class OnGroupedDataSet[T] extends AnyRef

Wraps a grouped data set, allowing to use anonymous partial functions to perform extraction of items in a tuple, case class instance or collection

T


The type of the grouped data set items
